highlights_html: Experience prime location convenience at this salon offering haircuts and highlights
highlights_text: Experience prime location convenience at this salon offering haircuts and highlights
about_deal_html:
Looking for a fresh new look? A trip to the salon can be just what’s needed. From cuts to colors, there are endless ways to express yourself. Get ready for compliments after visiting Downtown Hair Salon, where styling is made easy.

What We Offer

  • Women's Haircut, Blow-Dry, Conditioning Treatment, and Style

Valid with any stylist

Please see the below image for estimated lengths of short, medium, and long hair.

Why You Should Grab the Offer

With its prime location on Michigan Avenue in Chicago's bustling center, this salon is easily accessible during shopping or dining outings. It boasts expertise recognized by notable media outlets, ensuring top-notch service quality. Personalized hair regimens provide clients the knowledge they need post-visit to confidently maintain their style at home. Every visit guarantees precision cutting by skilled technicians, creating looks tailored uniquely towards enhancing each client's features—making it more than just another salon trip but rather an empowering experience promoting personal transformation.

review_quotes.text: One of my best haircuts ever!!!
review_quotes.author: Estella

review_quotes.text: Zoe was amazing! I brought in pics that I liked and she cut and styled my hair exactly like them. I’d recommend working with her! 🙌
review_quotes.author: Alexandra

review_quotes.text: I am pleasantly pleased with the results and would recommend to a friend
review_quotes.author: Anna

review_quotes.text: Love my cut! She made me feel comfortable right from the start. She was efficient yet thorough. Fantastic experience.
review_quotes.author: Parul

review_quotes.text: Zoe gave me the best haircut I have had in years.  She listened and cut it exactly how I wanted it.
review_quotes.author: Kim
